rows_detail.current_coverage: The manuscript and bibliography cite ROS and frame the current study as logical-layer Boolean-oracle synthesis.

rows_detail.next_reproduction_step: No immediate action; keep the literature anchor when venue formatting changes.
rows_detail.official_requirement: The paper must cite ROS and identify its resource-constrained LUT-oracle role before using a ROS-style baseline.
rows_detail.supported_claim: ROS is a relevant resource-constrained oracle-synthesis comparator family.

rows_detail.current_coverage: The project runs an ABC if -K sweep for K=3,4,5, verifies each mapped BLIF truth table, and selects the best K per function.

rows_detail.current_coverage: The line-sensitivity audit reselects the verified LUT sweep under min-ancilla and line-weighted objectives.
rows_detail.excluded_claim: This is not SAT garbage management and cannot be called a full ROS reproduction.
rows_detail.next_reproduction_step: Implement or obtain the ROS SAT garbage-management stage before making any official-ROS claim.
rows_detail.official_requirement: ROS explicitly targets qubit/garbage pressure through resource-aware choices.
rows_detail.supported_claim: The score advantage is robust to line-aware LUT proxy selectors.

rows_detail.current_coverage: The manuscript, README, and line-sensitivity audit explicitly mark SAT garbage management as not reproduced.
rows_detail.excluded_claim: No result may be described as beating or reproducing full ROS with SAT garbage management.
rows_detail.next_reproduction_step: Track down executable ROS artifacts or reimplement the SAT garbage-management formulation as a separate baseline.
rows_detail.official_requirement: Full ROS includes SAT-based garbage management after LUT mapping.
rows_detail.supported_claim: The package is transparent about the missing official ROS component.

rows_detail.current_coverage: Legacy RevKit CLI probes synthesize exact oracle permutations and serve as a separate reversible-synthesis counterpoint.
rows_detail.excluded_claim: The RevKit CLI probe is not the ROS hierarchical LUT plus SAT garbage-management flow.
rows_detail.next_reproduction_step: Add a ROS-compatible reversible emission stage if the official flow or enough algorithmic detail is reimplemented.
rows_detail.official_requirement: A full oracle-synthesis comparison should include a reversible-oracle emission path, not only logic-network estimates.
rows_detail.supported_claim: The paper has a genuine exact reversible-oracle toolchain probe in addition to LUT/XAG/AIG proxies.

rows_detail.current_coverage: Toolchain readiness records ABC, mockturtle, CirKit, RevKit API, and legacy RevKit/CirKit availability and separates them from full ROS.
rows_detail.excluded_claim: Tool availability is not the same as official ROS reproduction.
rows_detail.next_reproduction_step: Rerun the readiness audit after adding any official ROS source, binary, or independent reimplementation.
rows_detail.official_requirement: External comparisons should record which tools are locally runnable and which remain only proxy-level.
rows_detail.supported_claim: The external-probe environment is reproducible and provenance-recorded.

rows_detail.current_coverage: Claim matrix, comparison protocol, claim-scope lint, and manuscript limitations state the ROS boundary.
